videoSnippet.title: The Unbreakable Will || Praggnanandhaa vs Wei Yi || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R9
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2741) - Wei, Yi (2754)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.04.08
D40 Queen's Gambit Declined, Semi-Tarrasch defence, Pillsbury variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 c5 5.Bg5 cxd4 6.Nxd4 dxc4 7.e3 Be7 8.Bxc4 O-O 9.O-O Bd7 10.Nf3 Nc6 11.e4 Rc8 12.Qe2 Ng4 13.Bf4 Bf6 14.Bd6 Re8 15.Rad1 Nge5 16.Nxe5 Bxe5 17.Bb3 Qb6 18.Bxe5 Nxe5 19.Kh1 Rcd8 20.Qh5 Nc6 21.e5 Qb4 22.Rd3 Qf4 23.Rf3 Qxe5 24.Qxf7+ Kh8 25.Rd1 Bc8 26.h3 Rxd1+ 27.Nxd1 Rg8 28.Re3 Qd6 29.Nc3 Nd4 30.Ne4 Qe5 31.f4 Qf5 32.Nd6 Qc5 33.Qe7 Qc1+ 34.Kh2 h6 35.Re4 Nxb3 36.axb3 Kh7 37.Rc4 Qd2 38.Qc7 b5 39.Re4 Qd3 40.Re1 Qd2 41.Rf1 Ba6 42.Qc6 Rd8 43.Nf7 Rd7 44.Qe4+ g6 45.f5 exf5 46.Qe8 Qd4 47.Rf3 Rc7 48.Ne5 Rg7 49.Nf7 Rg8 50.Qe7 Qg7 51.Rd3 Bc8 52.Rc3 Rf8 53.Rc7 Kg8 54.Nd6 Qxe7 55.Rxe7 a6 56.Nxc8

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:20 Game Starts!!
02:56 Completely New Game!
04:00 Nice Photo!
08:00 Pause the Video!
16:10 IWITP
17:15 STANDINGS AFTER ROUND 9
18:40 Legends of the Channel
